description: Applies variational methods to approximate the partition function of the alignment. A simpler, solvable 'mean-field' Hamiltonian is proposed, and its parameters are optimized to minimize the variational free energy.
analogical_connections: Replacing a complex network of interacting people (letters) with a single 'average' person that everyone interacts with, simplifying the math.
implementation_hypothesis: Define a factorized probability distribution over alignments, and minimize the Kullback-Leibler divergence to the true Boltzmann distribution of alignments.
experiment_seed: Implement a Mean-Field approximation algorithm that iteratively updates the marginal probabilities of letter matches.
